########################################################################
# SCA trait deltas — the ONLY hand-maintained trait content.
#
# Each block below is a trait whose SCA version differs from base-game vanilla.
# rebuild-traits.ps1 takes current vanilla + these blocks and regenerates the
# mod's same-filename trait files. To change a trait, edit it HERE and rebuild.
# Do NOT edit the generated files in the mod folder directly - they get overwritten.
########################################################################

# --- trait_organic (base file: 02_species_traits_basic_characteristics.txt) ---
trait_organic = {
	cost = 0
	#SCA: trophic exclusivity handled via SCA_has_multiple_trophic_traits below (was: opposites = { "trait_infernal" }).
	sorting_priority = 20

	initial = yes
	randomized = no
	species_potential_add = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	immortal_leaders = no

	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL PRESAPIENT LITHOID } #SCA: +LITHOID
	tags = { organic positive special }
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	#SCA: limit trophic-trait stacking
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_has_multiple_trophic_traits = no
		}
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		# Food Upkeep
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_phototrophic = no
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_voidling }
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			food = @living_standard_food_normal
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_phototrophic = yes
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_voidling }
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			food = @living_standard_phototrophic_normal
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				OR = {
					has_trait = trait_cybernetic
					has_trait = trait_limited_cybernetic
				}
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			food = @living_standard_food_cyborg_reduction
		}
	}

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_organic.dds"

	custom_tooltip_with_modifiers = TRAIT_ORGANIC_EFFECT
}

# --- trait_lithoid (base file: 02_species_traits_basic_characteristics.txt) ---
trait_lithoid = {
	cost = 0
	host_has_dlc = "Lithoids Species Pack" #SCA: DLC lock

	sorting_priority = 20

	initial = yes
	randomized = no
	species_potential_add = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	immortal_leaders = no

	leader_age_min = 27
	leader_age_max = 38

	allowed_archetypes = { LITHOID PRESAPIENT BIOLOGICAL } #SCA: +BIOLOGICAL
	tags = { organic positive habitability leader army lithoid special }
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	#SCA: limit trophic-trait stacking
	species_class = { SCA_LITHOID }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_has_multiple_trophic_traits = no
		}
	}

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_lithoid.dds"

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		# Mineral Upkeep
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_phototrophic = no
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_voidling }
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			minerals = @living_standard_food_normal
		}

		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_phototrophic = yes
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_voidling }
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			minerals = @living_standard_phototrophic_normal
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				OR = {
					has_trait = trait_cybernetic
					has_trait = trait_limited_cybernetic
				}
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			minerals = @living_standard_food_cyborg_reduction
		}
	}

	custom_tooltip_with_modifiers = TRAIT_LITHOID_EFFECT
	modifier = {
		logistic_growth_mult = -0.25
		bonus_pop_growth_mult = -0.25
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.5
		army_health = 0.5
		leader_lifespan_add = 50
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				OR = {
					has_modifier = lithoid_crater
					has_deposit = d_lithoid_crater
				}
			}
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.5
	}
}

# --- trait_aquatic (base file: 02_species_traits_basic_characteristics.txt) ---
trait_aquatic = {
	cost = 2
	host_has_dlc = "Aquatics Species Pack"
	sorting_priority = 20

	random_weight = {
		AQUATIC = 100
		MOL = 10
		HUM = 2
		MAM = 2
		LITHOID = 0.5
	}

	allowed_planet_classes = {
		pc_ocean
	}

	allowed_planet_classes_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_auto_preference_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}

	species_possible_remove = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				exists = from
			}
			if = {
				limit = { NOT = { from = { has_ascension_perk = ap_hydrocentric } } }
				OR = {
					can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
					can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				}
			}
			else = {
				custom_tooltip = {
					fail_text = trait_aquatic_remove_hydrocentric
					always = no
				}
			}
		}
	}
	species_potential_add = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	initial = yes

	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive production habitability drawbacks special }
	#SCA: non-infernals only (was PSIONIC/AQUATIC species-class locked in vanilla)
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC SCA_LITHOID }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			is_infernal = no
		}
	}

	ai_weight = {
		weight = 1
		modifier = {
			factor = 0
			NOT = { has_trait = trait_pc_ocean_preference }
		}
	}

	custom_tooltip_with_modifiers = trait_aquatic_tooltip
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				OR = {
					is_planet_class = pc_ocean
					has_modifier = flooded_habitat
				}
			}
		}
		pop_housing_usage_mult = -0.1
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.1
	}
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				OR = {
					is_planet_class = pc_ocean
					has_modifier = flooded_habitat
				}
				exists = owner
				owner = { has_ascension_perk = ap_hydrocentric }
			}
		}
		pop_housing_usage_mult = -0.05
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.05
	}
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				NOR = {
					has_climate = wet
					has_modifier = flooded_habitat
				}
				is_ideal = no
			}
		}
		pop_housing_usage_mult = 0.3
	}
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				exists = owner
				owner = { has_ascension_perk = ap_hydrocentric }
				is_ideal = no
				NOR = {
					has_climate = wet
					has_modifier = flooded_habitat
				}
			}
		}
		pop_housing_usage_mult = 0.15
	}
	# To make it be able to evaluate habitability of planet it has not settled yet. Only applies to this species
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			NOR = {
				has_climate = wet
				has_modifier = flooded_habitat
			}
			is_ideal = no
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = -0.2
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			NOR = {
				has_climate = wet
				has_modifier = flooded_habitat
			}
			is_ideal = no
			exists = owner
			owner = { has_ascension_perk = ap_hydrocentric }
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = -0.1
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_modifier = flooded_habitat
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.2
	}
	modifier = {
		pc_ocean_habitability = 0.2
	}

	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_aquatic.dds"

	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			add = 1
			from = {
				OR = {
					is_planet_class = pc_ocean
					has_modifier = flooded_habitat
				}
			}
		}

		modifier = {
			subtract = 1
			from = {
				NOR = {
					has_climate = wet
					has_modifier = flooded_habitat
				}
				is_ideal = no
			}
		}
	}
}

# --- trait_presapient_starborn (base file: 03_species_traits_presapients.txt) ---
trait_presapient_starborn = {
	cost = 3
	opposites = { "trait_hive_mind" "trait_presapient_earthbound" "trait_syncretic_proles" "trait_sedentary" "trait_stargazer" "trait_nomadic" }
	initial = yes
	sapient = yes
	species_possible_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_presapient_starborn }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive migration habitability presapient }
	modifier = {
		pop_resettlement_cost_mult = -0.5
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		energy = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_presapient_earthbound (base file: 03_species_traits_presapients.txt) ---
trait_presapient_earthbound = {
	cost = 3
	opposites = { "trait_presapient_starborn" "trait_syncretic_proles" "trait_nomadic" "trait_stargazer" "trait_ingenious" "trait_resilient" }
	initial = yes
	sapient = yes
	species_possible_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_presapient_earthbound }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive pop_output energy army presapient }
	modifier = {
		technician_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.1
		army_defense_damage_mult = 0.5
	}
	slave_cost = {
		energy = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_presapient_natural_intellectuals (base file: 03_species_traits_presapients.txt) ---
trait_presapient_natural_intellectuals = {
	cost = 2
	opposites = { "trait_presapient_proles" "trait_syncretic_proles" "trait_intelligent" "trait_cranial_hypertrophy" "trait_cranial_megatrophy" "trait_very_strong" }
	initial = yes
	sapient = yes
	species_possible_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_presapient_natural_intellectuals }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive pop_output research unity mineral presapient }
	modifier = {
		bureaucrat_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.05
		researcher_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.1
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		energy = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_presapient_proles (base file: 03_species_traits_presapients.txt) ---
trait_presapient_proles = {
	cost = 2
	opposites = { "trait_presapient_natural_intellectuals" "trait_syncretic_proles" "trait_cranial_hypertrophy" "trait_cranial_megatrophy" "trait_intelligent" "trait_industrious" }
	initial = yes
	sapient = yes
	species_possible_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_presapient_proles }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive pop_output mineral food research presapient }
	modifier = {
		army_damage_mult = 0.10
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.10
		researcher_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.15
	}
	slave_cost = {
		energy = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_presapient_conservative (base file: 03_species_traits_presapients.txt) ---
trait_presapient_conservative = {
	cost = 1
	opposites = { "trait_hive_mind" "trait_presapient_proles" "trait_syncretic_proles" "trait_conformists" "trait_quarrelsome" "trait_deviants" }
	initial = yes
	randomized = no #Too harsh a negative
	sapient = yes
	species_possible_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_presapient_conservative }
		can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive happiness ethic_attraction leader presapient }
	modifier = {
		pop_happiness = 0.05
		pop_government_ethic_attraction = 0.25
		species_leader_exp_gain = -0.50
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	slave_cost = {
		energy = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_extremely_adaptive (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_extremely_adaptive = {
	cost = 4
	category = normal
	species_possible_add = {
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_nonadaptive" "trait_adaptive" "trait_robust" "trait_adaptive_lithoid" "trait_shelled" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Organic start only
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_is_lithoid = no
				can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive habitability }
	modifier = {
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.20
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_adaptive (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_adaptive = {
	cost = 2
	category = normal
	species_possible_add = {
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_nonadaptive" "trait_extremely_adaptive" "trait_robust" "trait_adaptive_lithoid" "trait_shelled" "trait_permeable_skin" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Organic start only
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_is_lithoid = no
				can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive habitability }
	modifier = {
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.10
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_nonadaptive (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_nonadaptive = {
	cost = -2
	category = normal
	species_potential_add = {
		can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_adaptive" "trait_extremely_adaptive" "trait_robust" "trait_adaptive_lithoid" "trait_shelled" "trait_permeable_skin" "trait_genetic_memory" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Organic start only
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_is_lithoid = no
				can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative habitability }
	modifier = {
		pop_environment_tolerance = -0.10
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -200
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

# --- trait_rapid_breeders (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_rapid_breeders = {
	cost = 2
    category = normal
	species_possible_add = {
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_pyroclastic" "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_fertile" "trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid" "trait_plantoid_budding" "trait_lithoid_budding" "trait_vat_grown" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_humanoid_existential_iteroparity" "trait_egg_laying" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Organic start only
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_is_lithoid = no
				can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive pop_growth }
	modifier = {
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_slow_breeders (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_slow_breeders = {
	cost = -2
    category = normal
	species_potential_add = {
		can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_pyroclastic" "trait_rapid_breeders" "trait_fertile" "trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid" "trait_plantoid_budding" "trait_lithoid_budding" "trait_vat_grown" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_humanoid_psychological_infertility" "trait_humanoid_existential_iteroparity" "trait_egg_laying" "trait_nascent_stage" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Organic start only
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_is_lithoid = no
				can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative pop_growth }
	modifier = {
		logistic_growth_mult = -0.1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -1000
	}
	ai_weight = {
		factor = 0
	}
}

# --- trait_fleeting (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_fleeting = {
	cost = -1
	category = normal
	species_potential_add = {
		can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
	}
	modifier = { leader_lifespan_add = -10 }
	opposites = { "trait_venerable" "trait_enduring" "trait_fleeting_lithoid" "trait_syncretic_proles" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Organic start only
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_is_lithoid = no
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative leader }
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -200
	}
}

# --- trait_fleeting_lithoid (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_fleeting_lithoid = {
	cost = -1
	category = normal
	species_potential_add = {
		can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
	}
	modifier = { leader_lifespan_add = -25 }
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_fleeting.dds"

	opposites = { "trait_venerable" "trait_enduring" "trait_fleeting" "trait_syncretic_proles" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	# SCA - Lithoid start only
	species_class = { SCA_LITHOID }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_is_lithoid = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative leader lithoid special }
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -200
	}
}

# --- trait_lithoid_scintillating (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_lithoid_scintillating = {
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}

	opposites = { "trait_lithoid_volatile_excretions" "trait_lithoid_gaseous_byproducts" "trait_drake_scaled" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { LITHOID }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_LITHOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive rare_resource production lithoid species }
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_LITHOID_SCINTILLATING_EFFECT

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				is_slave_or_better = yes
			}
			rare_crystals = @lithoid_trait_resource_production
			mult = value:lithoid_trait_mult
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_lithoid_gaseous_byproducts (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_lithoid_gaseous_byproducts = {
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}

	opposites = { "trait_lithoid_volatile_excretions" "trait_lithoid_scintillating" "trait_drake_scaled" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { LITHOID }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_LITHOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive rare_resource production lithoid species }
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_LITHOID_GASEOUS_BYPRODUCTS_EFFECT

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				is_slave_or_better = yes
			}
			exotic_gases = @lithoid_trait_resource_production
			mult = value:lithoid_trait_mult
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_lithoid_volatile_excretions (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_lithoid_volatile_excretions = {
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}

	opposites = { "trait_lithoid_gaseous_byproducts" "trait_lithoid_scintillating" "trait_drake_scaled" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { LITHOID }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_LITHOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive rare_resource production lithoid species }
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_LITHOID_VOLATILE_EXCRETIONS_EFFECT

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				is_slave_or_better = yes
			}
			volatile_motes = @lithoid_trait_resource_production
			mult = value:lithoid_trait_mult
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_plantoid_bloomed (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_plantoid_bloomed = {
	host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { PLANT FUN }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_FUNGOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PLANTOID
	}
	tags = { organic positive plantoid fungoid pop_output amenities housing special species }
	initial = no
	randomized = no
	species_potential_add = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	sorting_priority = 30
	custom_tooltip_with_modifiers = plantoid_bloomed_trait_tooltip
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				is_planet_class = pc_gaia
				NOR = {
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_4
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_pc_gaia
				}
			}
		}
		pop_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.10
		pop_amenities_usage_mult = -0.10
		pop_housing_usage_mult = -0.10
	}

	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				is_planet_class = pc_gaia
				OR = {
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_4
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_pc_gaia
				}
			}
		}
		pop_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.15
		pop_amenities_usage_mult = -0.15
		pop_housing_usage_mult = -0.15
	}

	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				is_planet_class = pc_gaia
				NOR = {
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_4
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_pc_gaia
				}
			}
		}
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.1
	}

	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				is_planet_class = pc_gaia
				OR = {
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_4
					has_active_building = building_gaiaseeders_pc_gaia
				}
			}
		}
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.15
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 2000
	}
}

# --- trait_plantoid_phototrophic (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_plantoid_phototrophic = {
	host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
	cost = 1

	random_weight = {
		PLANT = 3
	}
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_plantoid_phototrophic }
		SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_plantoid_radiotrophic" "trait_voidling" "trait_cave_dweller" }
	#SCA - Let's be more precise about things.
	portrait_override = { fun1 fun4 fun7 fun17 avi3 mol18 stargazer_01 lith6 bio6 nec3 }
	species_class = { PLANT }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_FUNGOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PLANTOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive plantoid fungoid upkeep species }
	sorting_priority = 30
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_PLANTOID_PHOTOTROPHIC_EFFECT

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		# Energy Upkeep
		# Suppressed when the Pop also has Radiotrophic, which supersedes Phototrophic; otherwise the Pop would pay both traits' Energy upkeep.
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_plantoid_radiotrophic }
			}
			energy = @living_standard_phototrophic_normal
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_plantoid_radiotrophic (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_plantoid_radiotrophic = {
	host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
	cost = 2

	random_weight = {
		FUN = 2
		TOX = 2
		PLANT = 1.5
	}
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_plantoid_radiotrophic }
		OR = {
			has_harvested_radiotrophic_dna = yes
			SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_plantoid_phototrophic" "trait_voidling" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#SCA - Toxoids love radiation
	species_class = { PLANT FUN LITHOID TOX INF }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_FUNGOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PLANTOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_LITHOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_TOXOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_INFERNAL
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
				has_harvested_radiotrophic_dna = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive plantoid fungoid lithoid infernal upkeep species }
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_PLANTOID_RADIOTROPHIC_EFFECT
	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		# Energy Upkeep
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_being_purged = no
				exists = planet
				NOT = {
					planet = { is_planet_class = pc_nuked }
				}
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			energy = @living_standard_phototrophic_normal
		}
	}
	modifier = {
		pc_nuked_habitability = 0.1
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = { has_deposit = d_lithoid_crater }
		}
		pc_nuked_habitability = 0.05
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = { is_planet_class = pc_nuked }
		}
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.1
		mult = value:lithoid_trait_mult
	}
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = { has_modifier = wasteland_radiation }
		}
		pop_happiness = 0.1
		mult = value:lithoid_trait_mult
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1500
	}
	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			add = 1
			from = { is_planet_class = pc_nuked }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 0.05
			from = {
				is_planet_class = pc_nuked
				has_deposit = d_lithoid_crater
			}
		}
	}
}

# --- trait_plantoid_budding (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_plantoid_budding = {
	host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
	cost = 2
	random_weight = {
		FUN = 2
		PLANT = 2
		AQUATIC = 2
	}
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_plantoid_budding }
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_lithoid }
		SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_pyroclastic" "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_rapid_breeders" "trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid" "trait_necrophage" "trait_clone_soldier_infertile" "trait_clone_soldier_infertile_full_potential" "trait_lithoid_budding" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_egg_laying" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { PLANT FUN }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_FUNGOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PLANTOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	#SCA - more budding
	portrait_override = { aqu7 nec3 stargazer_01 art9 art12 mol6 mol12 mol16 mol17 bio6 bio8 aqu1 tox3 tox4 tox7 psionic_05 psionic_12 }
	tags = { organic positive plantoid fungoid pop_growth species }
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_PLANTOID_BUDDING_EFFECT

	triggered_planet_pop_group_modifier_for_species = {
		potential = {
			has_budding_trait = yes
		}
		divide_over_pop_groups = no
		bonus_pop_growth = @plantoid_budding_rate
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 2000
	}
}

# --- trait_invasive (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_invasive = {
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_plantoid_invasive_species.dds"
	cost = 2
	opposites = { "trait_agrarian" "trait_ingenious" "trait_industrious" "trait_intelligent" "trait_thrifty" "trait_natural_engineers" "trait_natural_physicists" "trait_natural_sociologists" "trait_extremely_adaptive" "trait_adaptive" "trait_rapid_breeders" "trait_talented" "trait_quick_learners" "trait_traditional" "trait_docile" "trait_very_strong" "trait_strong" "trait_nomadic" "trait_communal" "trait_charismatic" "trait_conformists" "trait_venerable" "trait_enduring"
	"trait_resilient" "trait_conservational" "trait_noxious" "trait_inorganic_breath" "trait_humanoid_existential_iteroparity" "trait_incubator" "trait_delicious" "trait_nerve_stapled" "trait_fertile" "trait_robust" "trait_erudite" "trait_vat_grown" "trait_felsic" "trait_natural_machinist" "trait_drake_scaled" "trait_voidling" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_exotic_metabolism" "trait_egg_laying" "trait_chromalogs" "trait_camouflage" "trait_shelled" "trait_uncanny_intuition"
	"trait_cranial_hypertrophy" "trait_cranial_megatrophy" "trait_shell_slag" "trait_unbreakable_resolve" "trait_recursive_learners" "trait_photoadaptive" "trait_reavers" }
	host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
	sorting_priority = 30

	initial = yes
	randomized = no
	species_potential_add = {
		can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { PLANT FUN }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_FUNGOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PLANTOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive plantoid fungoid pop_growth habitability species }

	custom_tooltip_with_modifiers = TRAIT_INVASIVE_EFFECT
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.05
		mult = value:count_negative_traits
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = from
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.05
		mult = value:count_negative_traits
	}
}

# --- trait_lithoid_budding (base file: 04_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_lithoid_budding = {
	host_has_dlc = "Plantoids Species Pack"
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_pyroclastic" "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_rapid_breeders" "trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid" "trait_necrophage" "trait_clone_soldier_infertile" "trait_clone_soldier_infertile_full_potential" "trait_incubator" "trait_plantoid_budding" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_egg_laying" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { SCA_LITHOID }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_LITHOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
				SCA_is_lithoid = yes
				has_trait = trait_sca_calamitous_birth
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive lithoid pop_growth species }
	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_LITHOID_BUDDING_EFFECT

	triggered_planet_pop_group_modifier_for_species = {
		potential = {
			has_budding_trait = yes
			exists = planet
			NOT = { planet = { has_deposit = d_lithoid_crater } }
		}
		divide_over_pop_groups = no
		bonus_pop_growth = @plantoid_budding_rate
	}
	triggered_planet_pop_group_modifier_for_species = {
		potential = {
			has_budding_trait = yes
			exists = planet
			planet = { has_deposit = d_lithoid_crater }
		}
		bonus_pop_growth = @lithoid_crater_budding_rate
	}


	slave_cost = {
		trade = 2000
	}
}

# --- trait_adaptive_lithoid (base file: 09_ascension_traits.txt) ---
trait_adaptive_lithoid = {
	cost = 2
	species_potential_add = {
		can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_adaptive.dds"
	initial = no
	randomized = no
	advanced_trait = yes
	opposites = { "trait_nonadaptive" "trait_extremely_adaptive" "trait_robust" "trait_adaptive" "trait_shelled" }
	#allowed_archetypes = { LITHOID }
	#tags = { organic positive habitability lithoid species genetic_ascension special }
	modifier = {
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.10
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid (base file: 09_ascension_traits.txt) ---
trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid = {
	cost = 2
	species_potential_add = {
		can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_rapid_breeders.dds"
	initial = no
	randomized = no
	advanced_trait = yes
	opposites = { "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_rapid_breeders" "trait_fertile" "trait_plantoid_budding" "trait_lithoid_budding" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_egg_laying" }
	#allowed_archetypes = { LITHOID }
	#tags = { organic positive pop_growth lithoid species genetic_ascension special }
	modifier = {
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 2000
	}
}

# --- trait_delicious (base file: 09_ascension_traits.txt) ---
trait_delicious = {
	cost = {
		base = 2
		modifier = {
			add = -1
			advanced_traits_have_reduced_cost = yes
		}
	}
	opposites = { "trait_infernal" }
	species_potential_add = {
		can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	initial = no
	randomized = no
	advanced_trait = yes
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive food livestock genetic_ascension }
	modifier = {
		pop_livestock_bonus_workforce_mult = 1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_felsic (base file: 09_ascension_traits.txt) ---
trait_felsic = {
	cost = {
		base = 2
		modifier = {
			add = -1
			advanced_traits_have_reduced_cost = yes
		}
	}
	species_potential_add = {
		can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	initial = no
	randomized = no
	advanced_trait = yes
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive livestock mineral genetic_ascension }

	modifier = {
		pop_livestock_lithoid_bonus_workforce_mult = 1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_ductile (base file: 09_ascension_traits.txt) ---
trait_ductile = {
	cost = {
		base = 2
		modifier = {
			add = -1
			advanced_traits_have_reduced_cost = yes
		}
	}
	species_potential_add = {
		can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_do_advanced_gene_modding = yes
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	initial = no
	randomized = no
	advanced_trait = yes
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	tags = { organic positive alloys livestock genetic_ascension }
	#species_class = { INF }
	modifier = {
		pop_livestock_infernal_bonus_workforce_mult = 1
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1500
	}
}

# --- trait_egg_laying (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_egg_laying = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
			can_remove_pop_growth_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_pyroclastic" "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_fertile" "trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid" "trait_plantoid_budding" "trait_lithoid_budding" "trait_vat_grown" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_humanoid_existential_iteroparity" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { SCA_ORGANIC }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AVIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_REPTILIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AQUATIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				SCA_is_lithoid = no
			}
		}
	}
	#portrait_override = { mam16 mindwarden_01 }
	tags = { organic positive pop_growth avian reptilian aquatic species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_egg_laying_effect
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			OR = {
				AND = {
					planet = {
						NOT = { has_deficit = minerals }
					}
					from = { has_trait = trait_lithoid }
				}
				AND = {
					planet = {
						NOT = { has_deficit = food }
					}
					from = { has_trait = trait_organic }
				}
				AND = {
					planet = {
						NOT = { has_deficit = alloys }
					}
					from = { has_trait = trait_infernal }
				}
			}
		}
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.15
	}

	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			add = 2
			OR = {
				AND = {
					from = {
						NOT = { has_deficit = minerals }
					}
					has_trait = trait_lithoid
				}
				AND = {
					from = {
						NOT = { has_deficit = food }
					}
				}
				AND = {
					from = {
						NOT = { has_deficit = alloys }
					}
					has_trait = trait_infernal
				}
			}
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_seasonal_dormancy (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_seasonal_dormancy = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	#portrait_override = { fun16 fun4 mindwarden_01 }
	opposites = { "trait_wasteful" "trait_conservational" "trait_low_maintenance" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { MAM REP }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MAMMALIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_REPTILIAN
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive upkeep mammalian reptilian species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_seasonal_dormancy_effect
	modifier = {
		planet_pops_upkeep_mult = -0.15
	}
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			OR = {
				is_unemployed = yes
				is_pop_category = civilian
				is_pop_category = maintenance_drone
			}
		}
		planet_pops_upkeep_mult = -0.60
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}

	assembly_score = {
		base = 1
		modifier = {
			from = { free_jobs = 0 }
			add = 1.5
		}
	}
}

# --- trait_hollow_bones (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_hollow_bones = { #Add non-randomized version
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = -3
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_hollow_bones }
		SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_strong" "trait_very_strong" "trait_weak" "trait_tankbound" "trait_photoadaptive" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#SCA: Add more possible portraits
	portrait_override = { fun16 fun4 aqu13 }
	species_class = { TOX AVI NECROID }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AVIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_TOXOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_NECROID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative pop_output avian toxoid species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_hollow_bones_effect
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
		}
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.01	# -0.1%
		soldier_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.01
		mult = value:hollow_bones_mult								# Multiplied by 2/3 × planet size
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = -400
	}

	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			from = { planet_size >= 15 }
			add = -2
		}
	}
}

# --- trait_rooted (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_rooted = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = -3
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_rooted }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_sedentary" "trait_nomadic" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { FUN PLANT }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_FUNGOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PLANTOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	#SCA - more rooted species
	portrait_override = { aqu7 lith6 nec3 stargazer_01 bio6 lith12 tox3 }
	tags = { organic negative migration fungoid plantoid species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_rooted_effect
	modifier = {
		pop_resettlement_cost_mult = 2
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = -400
	}
	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			from = { free_jobs = 0 }
			add = -2
		}
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
}

# --- trait_acidic_vascularity (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_acidic_vascularity = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 1
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { NECROID TOX }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_NECROID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_TOXOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive army necroid toxoid species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_acidic_vascularity_effect
	modifier = {
		pop_cat_purge_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.75
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_shelled (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_shelled = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	random_weight = {
		REP = 5
		MOL = 2
	}
	cost = 3
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_shelled }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_nonadaptive" "trait_adaptive" "trait_extremely_adaptive" "trait_robust" "trait_adaptive_lithoid" "trait_communal" "trait_spatial_mastery" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#SCA: Also allow bugs
	species_class = { MOL NECROID ART }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MOLLUSCOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_NECROID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	portrait_override = { rep14 pro2 aqu3 aqu10 fun15 tox5 tox9 }
	tags = { organic positive habitability housing necroid molluscoid arthropoid species }
	modifier = {
		pop_housing_usage_mult = -0.3
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.10
	}
	assembly_score = {
		base = 1
		modifier = {
			from = { free_housing <= 1000 }
			add = 1.5
		}
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1500
	}
}

# --- trait_camouflage (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_camouflage = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 1
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_nerve_stapled" "trait_natural_physicists" "trait_chromalogs" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { AQUATIC ART REP }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_REPTILIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AQUATIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	portrait_override = { tox12 mindwarden_01 }
	tags = { organic positive army research pop_output aquatic arthropoid reptilian species }
	modifier = {
		physicist_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.10
		army_health = 0.2
	}

	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			add = 1
			from = { has_research_designation = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 1
			from = { has_building = building_order_keep }
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_chromalogs (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_chromalogs = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 4
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_nerve_stapled" "trait_natural_physicists" "trait_camouflage" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { AQUATIC ART REP }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_REPTILIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AQUATIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	portrait_override = { avi18 tox12 mindwarden_01 }
	tags = { organic positive army research pop_output unity aquatic arthropoid reptilian species }
	modifier = {
		physicist_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.20
		bureaucrat_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.20
		army_health = 0.4
		pop_government_ethic_attraction = 0.15
	}

	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			add = 1.5
			from = { has_research_designation = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 1.5
			from = { has_unity_designation = yes }
		}
		modifier = {
			add = 3
			from = { has_building = building_order_keep }
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1500
	}
}

# --- trait_brittle (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_brittle = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = -3
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_brittle }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#SCA - also allow bugs
	species_class = { LITHOID NECROID ART }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_LITHOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_NECROID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative amenities lithoid necroid species }
	modifier = {
		pop_amenities_usage_add = 0.5
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -1000
	}
	assembly_score = {
		modifier = {
			add = -2
			from = { free_amenities <= 10 }
		}
	}
}

# --- trait_familial (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_familial = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
		owner_is_hive_empire = no
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	portrait_override = { fun16 fun4 lith_human pla17 aqu5 }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { HUM MAM AVI }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AVIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_HUMANOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MAMMALIAN
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive happiness humanoid mammalian avian individual species }
	forbidden_ethics = { ethic_gestalt_consciousness }
	custom_tooltip = trait_familial_effect
	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		pop_happiness = 0.00001
		mult = planet.value:counter_familial
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}

	assembly_score = {
		base = 1
	}
}

# --- trait_permeable_skin (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_permeable_skin = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = -1
	species_potential_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	opposites = { "trait_adaptive" "trait_extremely_adaptive" }
	allowed_planet_classes = {
		pc_tropical
		pc_arid
		pc_continental
		pc_ocean
		pc_tundra
		pc_arctic
		pc_alpine
		pc_savannah
		pc_desert
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { MOL AQUATIC }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MOLLUSCOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AQUATIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative habitability molluscoid aquatic species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_permeable_skin_effect
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = from
			from = {
				OR = {
					AND = {
						ideal_planet_is_wet = yes
						root = {
							OR = {
								is_dry = yes
								is_cold = yes
							}
						}
					}
					AND = {
						ideal_planet_is_dry = yes
						root = {
							OR = {
								is_wet = yes
								is_cold = yes
							}
						}
					}
					AND = {
						ideal_planet_is_cold = yes
						root = {
							OR = {
								is_dry = yes
								is_wet = yes
							}
						}
					}
				}
			}
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = -0.2
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -1000
	}
}

# --- trait_genetic_memory (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_genetic_memory = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 3
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	#portrait_override = { fun16 fun4 lith_human pla17 aqu5 }
	opposites = { "trait_nonadaptive" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { HUM MAM NECROID }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_HUMANOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MAMMALIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_NECROID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive habitability humanoid mammalian necroid species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_genetic_memory_effect
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			exists = planet
			planet = {
				is_colony = yes
			}
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = 0.005
		mult = value:genetic_memory_mult
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_nascent_stage (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_nascent_stage = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = -2
	species_potential_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	#portrait_override = { fun16 fun4 lith_human pla17 aqu5 mindwarden_01 }
	opposites = { "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_humanoid_psychological_infertility" "trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_3" "trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_2" "trait_unplugged_cybernetic_positives_1" "trait_pathogenic_genes" "trait_wilderness" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { HUM MAM REP ART }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_HUMANOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MAMMALIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_REPTILIAN
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative pop_growth humanoid mammalian reptilian arthropoid species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_nascent_stage_effect
	slave_cost = {
		trade = -1000
	}
}

# --- trait_flight (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_flight = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = 2
	random_weight = {
		MAM = 5
		REP = 5
		FUN = 5
		NECROID = 5
		TOX = 5
		MOL = 2
	}
	opposites = { "trait_spatial_mastery" "trait_rooted" }
	species_potential_add = {
		# Random/genemodded version
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_flight }
		SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { AVI ART }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AVIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_can_add_special_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	#SCA - add all floating species
	portrait_override = { mam1 rep17 bio10 mammalian_ar_07 mol7 fun3 pla3 lith2 lith4 lith11 nec5 aqu10 aqu12 tox5 tox8 psionic_01 psionic_12 }
	tags = { organic positive army leader avian arthropoid species }
	modifier = {
		commander_skill_add = 1
		army_damage_taken_mult = -0.30
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_spatial_mastery (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_spatial_mastery = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = 4
	opposites = { "trait_communal" "trait_shelled" "trait_flight" }
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { AVI ART }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_AVIAN
		SPECIES_TRAIT_ARTHROPOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	#SCA - add all floating species
	portrait_override = { mam1 rep17 bio10 mammalian_ar_07 mol7 fun3 pla3 lith2 lith4 lith11 nec5 aqu10 aqu12 tox5 tox8 psionic_01 psionic_12 }
	tags = { organic positive army housing leader avian arthropoid species }
	modifier = {
		leader_skill_add = 1
		army_damage_taken_mult = -0.50
		pop_housing_usage_mult = -0.10
	}
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_spare_organs (base file: 15_biogenesis_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_spare_organs = {
	host_has_dlc = "BioGenesis"
	cost = 2
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#species_class = { MOL NECROID TOX }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_MOLLUSCOID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_NECROID
		SPECIES_TRAIT_TOXOID
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive army leader molluscoid necroid toxoid species }
	custom_tooltip = trait_spare_organs_effect
	modifier = {
		livestock_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.5
	}

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				exists = owner
				owner = {
					NOT = {
						has_origin = origin_evolutionary_predators
					}
					is_megacorp = yes
					is_mutation_authority = yes
				}
			}
			trade = 0.5
		}
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1000
	}
}

# --- trait_infernal (base file: 16_infernals_traits.txt) ---
trait_infernal = {
	cost = 0
	category = normal
	#SCA: trophic exclusivity is handled via SCA_has_multiple_trophic_traits below, not hard opposites.
	#opposites = { "trait_lithoid" "trait_aquatic" "trait_organic" "trait_agrarian" }
	host_has_dlc = "Infernals Species Pack" # SCA: DLC lock
	sorting_priority = 20
	initial = yes #SCA: selectable at game start
	randomized = no
	species_potential_add = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_merge_add = {
		always = no
	}
	immortal_leaders = no
	leader_age_min = 25
	leader_age_max = 40
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL PRESAPIENT LITHOID } #SCA: +LITHOID
	tags = { organic species infernal leader habitability special }

	#SCA: retarget to SCA class + limit trophic-trait stacking (was: species_class = { INF PRE_INF })
	species_class = { SCA_INFERNAL }
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			SCA_has_multiple_trophic_traits = no
		}
	}
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_INFERNAL
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_infernal.dds"

	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_phototrophic = no
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_voidling }
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			alloys = @living_standard_alloys_normal
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				is_phototrophic = yes
				NOT = { has_trait = trait_voidling }
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			alloys = @living_standard_alloys_phototrophic
		}
		upkeep = {
			trigger = {
				OR = {
					has_trait = trait_cybernetic
					has_trait = trait_limited_cybernetic
				}
				is_being_purged = no
				is_sapient = yes
			}
			alloys = @living_standard_alloys_cyborg_reduction
		}
	}

	custom_tooltip = TRAIT_INFERNAL_EFFECT
	modifier = {
		leader_lifespan_add = 10
		pc_volcanic_habitability = 0.2
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			has_climate = cold
		}
		pop_environment_tolerance = -0.3
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			is_planet_class = pc_volcanic
		}
		habitability_floor_add = 0.5
	}
}

# --- trait_shell_slag (base file: 16_infernals_traits.txt) ---
trait_shell_slag = {
	host_has_dlc = "Infernals Species Pack"
	cost = 2
	category = normal
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	initial = yes
	randomized = yes
	opposites = { "trait_invasive" "trait_drake_scaled" }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID } #SCA: +LITHOID
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
				is_infernal = yes #SCA: actual infernals can always take it
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive infernal species rare_resource production}
	species_class = { SCA_INFERNAL } #SCA: was { INF }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_INFERNAL
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_shell_slag.dds"
	custom_tooltip = trait_shell_slag_tooltip
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
	resources = {
		category = planet_pops
		produces = {
			trigger = {
				is_slave_or_better = yes
			}
			sr_living_metal = @shell_slag_trait_resource_production
		}
	}

}

# --- trait_pyroclastic (base file: 16_infernals_traits.txt) ---
trait_pyroclastic = {
	host_has_dlc = "Infernals Species Pack"
	cost = 1
	category = normal
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
				is_infernal = yes #SCA: actual infernals can always take it
			}
		}
	}
	opposites = { "trait_rapid_breeders" "trait_incubator" "trait_slow_breeders" "trait_fertile" "trait_rapid_breeders_lithoid" "trait_plantoid_budding" "trait_lithoid_budding" "trait_vat_grown" "trait_tiyanki" "trait_humanoid_existential_iteroparity" "trait_egg_laying" }
	initial = yes
	randomized = yes
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID } #SCA: +LITHOID
	tags = { organic infernal positive pop_growth species }
	species_class = { SCA_INFERNAL } #SCA: was { INF }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_INFERNAL
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_pyroclastic.dds"
	custom_tooltip = trait_pyroclastic_tooltip
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
	triggered_planet_growth_habitability_modifier = {
		potential = {
			is_planet_class = pc_volcanic
		}
		# Adjust trait_pyroclastic_tooltip if this changes
		logistic_growth_mult = 0.10
	}
}

# --- trait_crucible_community (base file: 16_infernals_traits.txt) ---
trait_crucible_community = {
	host_has_dlc = "Infernals Species Pack"
	cost = 1
	category = normal
	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	country_modifier = {
		country_edict_fund_add = 0.0025
	}
	initial = yes
	randomized = yes
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID } #SCA: +LITHOID
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			OR = {
				can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
				can_add_transgenic_traits = yes
			}
		}
	}
	tags = { organic infernal positive edict_fund }
	#species_class = { INF } #SCA: unlocked from INF class
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_INFERNAL
	}
	ai_weight = {
		weight = 0
	}
	icon = "gfx/interface/icons/traits/trait_crucible_community.dds"
	custom_tooltip = trait_crucible_community_tooltip
	slave_cost = {
		trade = 500
	}
}

# --- trait_tankbound (base file: 17_shroud_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_tankbound = {
	host_has_dlc = "Shadows of the Shroud"

	initial = no
	randomized = no

	species_possible_add = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		always = no
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = no
	}
	opposites = { "trait_weak" "trait_hollow_bones" "trait_photoadaptive" }

	custom_tooltip_with_modifiers = trait_tankbound_effects

	#SCA: drop the portrait lock, restrict by archetype instead (matches the
	#     other Shroud traits, which already use allowed_archetypes).
	#portrait_override = { nec9 tox13 psionic_07 inf4 }
	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }

	triggered_pop_group_modifier = {
		planet_pops_alloys_upkeep_mult = -0.5
		planet_pops_minerals_upkeep_mult = -0.5
		planet_pops_food_upkeep_mult = -0.5
		planet_pops_energy_upkeep_mult = -0.5
	}
	modifier = {
		pop_amenities_usage_mult = 0.5
		logistic_growth_mult = -0.25
	}
}

# --- trait_uncanny_intuition (base file: 17_shroud_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_uncanny_intuition = {
	host_has_dlc = "Shadows of the Shroud"
	cost = 3
	category = psionic

	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}

	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#SCA: unlock from the PSIONIC species class / portrait lock.
	#species_class = { PSIONIC }
	#portrait_override = { psionic_01 psionic_02 psionic_03 psionic_04 psionic_05 psionic_06 psionic_07 psionic_08 psionic_09 psionic_10 psionic_12 mindwarden_01 mam_rat }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PSIONIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive psionic species }

	modifier = {
		councilor_skill_add = 2
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 2000
	}
}

# --- trait_cranial_hypertrophy (base file: 17_shroud_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_cranial_hypertrophy = {
	host_has_dlc = "Shadows of the Shroud"
	#SCA: make it a random/genemodded trait.
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = 2
	category = psionic

	#SCA: random/genemodded version add condition.
	species_potential_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_cranial_hypertrophy }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}

	opposites = { "trait_intelligent" "trait_cranial_megatrophy" }

	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { PSIONIC }
	#SCA: expanded portrait list (adds humanoid_04+ and others; removes psionic_03 psionic_10 mindwarden_01).
	portrait_override = { psionic_01 psionic_02 psionic_04 psionic_05 psionic_06 psionic_07 psionic_08 psionic_09 psionic_12 humanoid_hp_16 fun8 nec6 tox10 aqu12 mol7 tox13 mam_rat humanoid_04 humanoid_hp_06 humanoid_hp_07 humanoid_hp_08 humanoid_hp_13 synth07 mam8 avi8 rep1 rep8 bio9 cyb10 cyb11 mol2 mol12 ant1 bio6 fun2 fun4 fun16 pla9 pla15 nec1 nec8 aqu3 aqu4 aqu5 aqu13 tox5 tox8 }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PSIONIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive pop_output psionic species }

	modifier = {
		researcher_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.15
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.1
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 1500
	}
}

# --- trait_cranial_megatrophy (base file: 17_shroud_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_cranial_megatrophy = {
	host_has_dlc = "Shadows of the Shroud"
	#SCA: make it a random/genemodded trait.
	initial = no
	randomized = yes
	cost = 4
	category = psionic

	#SCA: random/genemodded version add condition.
	species_potential_add = {
		NOT = { has_trait = trait_cranial_hypertrophy }
		can_add_genetic_traits = yes
	}
	species_possible_remove = {
		OR = {
			can_remove_beneficial_genetic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	species_possible_merge_remove = {
		always = yes
	}
	opposites = { "trait_intelligent" "trait_cranial_hypertrophy" }

	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	species_class = { PSIONIC }
	#SCA: expanded portrait list (adds humanoid_04+ and others; removes psionic_03 psionic_10 mindwarden_01).
	portrait_override = { psionic_01 psionic_02 psionic_04 psionic_05 psionic_06 psionic_07 psionic_08 psionic_09 psionic_12 humanoid_hp_16 fun8 nec6 tox10 aqu12 mol7 tox13 mam_rat humanoid_04 humanoid_hp_06 humanoid_hp_07 humanoid_hp_08 humanoid_hp_13 synth07 mam8 avi8 rep1 rep8 bio9 cyb10 cyb11 mol2 mol12 ant1 bio6 fun2 fun4 fun16 pla9 pla15 nec1 nec8 aqu3 aqu4 aqu5 aqu13 tox5 tox8 }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PSIONIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_genetic_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic positive pop_output psionic species }

	modifier = {
		researcher_jobs_bonus_workforce_mult = 0.25
		worker_and_simple_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.2
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = 2000
	}
}

# --- trait_haunting_visions (base file: 17_shroud_species_traits.txt) ---
trait_haunting_visions = {
	host_has_dlc = "Shadows of the Shroud"
	cost = -2
	category = psionic

	species_possible_add = {
		OR = {
			can_add_negative_organic_traits = yes
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}

	allowed_archetypes = { BIOLOGICAL LITHOID }
	#SCA: unlock from the PSIONIC species class / portrait lock.
	#species_class = { PSIONIC }
	#portrait_override = { psionic_01 psionic_02 psionic_03 psionic_04 psionic_05 psionic_06 psionic_07 psionic_08 psionic_09 psionic_10 psionic_12 mindwarden_01 mam_rat }
	localized_tags = {
		SPECIES_TRAIT_PSIONIC
	}
	species_class_override = {
		hidden_trigger = {
			can_add_or_remove_phenotype_traits = yes
		}
	}
	tags = { organic negative pop_output psionic species }

	modifier = {
		specialist_and_complex_drone_cat_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.1
		pop_cat_ruler_bonus_workforce_mult = -0.1
	}

	slave_cost = {
		trade = -1000
	}
}
